---
title: "Scientific Computing I: Foundations of Numerical Methods"
subtitle: "CORE-004 | Core Mathematics — Year 1"
description: "Practical and theoretical foundations of numerical computation. Every model in the curriculum eventually requires numerical implementation; this course teaches the student to do it correctly, efficiently, and with rigorous error control."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Scientific Computing I: Foundations of Numerical Methods

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
